name: Read Skill
description: Read one page markdown file, multiple page files, or a document page range.

tools.name: read
tools.description: Read one page markdown file, multiple page files, or a document page range.

parameters.name: file_paths
parameters.description: Multiple page files to read; pages are grouped by document.

parameters.name: start_page
parameters.description: Start page number for range reads.

parameters.name: end_page
parameters.description: End page number for range reads.

parameters.name: max_pages
parameters.description: Maximum pages to read in one call.

parameters.name: max_chars
parameters.description: Maximum raw characters to read in one call.
